profile.intro: I'm a Systems Engineering student passionate about software development, DevOps, and building high-impact digital products.

aboutModal.title: About me
aboutModal.para1: Hi! I'm {name}. Beyond coding, I enjoy teaching, writing, and exploring new tools that improve developer experience. I'm motivated by building solutions that generate real impact and sharing knowledge with the community.
aboutModal.para2: I'm a growth-oriented person with strong analytical and algorithmic problem-solving skills. My experience as a developer has allowed me to play an integral role across frontend, backend, and databases. Tackling challenges in these areas drives me to continuously improve and expand my competencies, contributing versatilely throughout the entire software development cycle.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: React, Next.js, Tailwind, CSS, HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript

A career focused on creating robust software and applying algorithms to model, simulate, and analyze large volumes of data. It strengthens work in multidisciplinary teams, the use of quality standards, and the development of technology projects with ethical responsibility and a sustainable vision.

items.degree: Technology in Information Systems Analysis and Development
items.description: 24-month technology program focused on information systems analysis and development. Trains students to plan, design, build, test, and adjust applications that systematize or automate organizational processes.
English course focused on conversation and listening comprehension.
Core AWS services and cloud best practices.
